label: scene 2 contact-founding
content:
```svg
<defs>
  <linearGradient id="skyG" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
    <stop offset="0" stop-color="#4fa8bc"/>
    <stop offset=".5" stop-color="#8ec9c6"/>
    <stop offset=".85" stop-color="#cfe0c8"/>
    <stop offset="1" stop-color="#e9e4c6"/>
  </linearGradient>
  <linearGradient id="hazeG" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
    <stop offset="0" stop-color="#5f7367" stop-opacity="0"/>
    <stop offset=".55" stop-color="#5f7367" stop-opacity="0"/>
    <stop offset="1" stop-color="#5f7367" stop-opacity=".5"/>
  </linearGradient>
  <linearGradient id="waterG" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
    <stop offset="0" stop-color="#7fbdb8"/>
    <stop offset=".25" stop-color="#3f97a0"/>
    <stop offset=".6" stop-color="#2a7d8c"/>
    <stop offset="1" stop-color="#12435a"/>
  </linearGradient>
  <linearGradient id="landG" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
    <stop offset="0" stop-color="#4b8a63"/>
    <stop offset=".45" stop-color="#2f6b4f"/>
    <stop offset="1" stop-color="#1f3d2b"/>
  </linearGradient>
  <linearGradient id="mudG" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
    <stop offset="0" stop-color="#d5c79e"/>
    <stop offset="1" stop-color="#a3956e"/>
  </linearGradient>
  <linearGradient id="poolG" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
    <stop offset="0" stop-color="#7fbdb8"/>
    <stop offset="1" stop-color="#12435a"/>
  </linearGradient>

  <g id="cloud" fill="#ffffff">

    <ellipse cx="32" cy="5" rx="28" ry="9"/>
    <rect x="-55" y="4" width="115" height="9" rx="4"/>
  </g>

  <g id="frig" fill="none" stroke="#274035" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round">

    <circle cx="7" cy="-116" r="3" fill="#6e5f3f" stroke="none"/>
    <circle cx="13" cy="-113" r="2.6" fill="#6e5f3f" stroke="none"/>
  </g>

  <g id="wader">
```
